---
title: "Boating Accidents"
author: "Mitch Harrison"
categories:
  - "Data Viz"
  - "Reports"
image: "../../images/thumbnails/projects/tidytuesday/05212024.png"
---

```{r}
#| label: import-libs-and-data

library(tidyverse)
library(RSQLite)

PATH <- "projects/boating_accidents/data/"

# connect to databases
con09 <- dbConnect(SQLite(), dbname = paste0(PATH, "bard-2009-2013.sqlite"))
con14 <- dbConnect(SQLite(), dbname = paste0(PATH, "bard-2014-2022.sqlite"))
con23 <- dbConnect(SQLite(), dbname = paste0(PATH, "bard-2023-2023.sqlite"))

# export data tables at R tibbles
accs09 <- tbl(con09, "ReleasableAccidents") |>
  collect()
accs14 <- tbl(con14, "ReleasableAccidentes") |>
  select(!Year) |>
  collect()
accs23 <- tbl(con23, "ReleasableAccidents") |>
  collect()

injs09 <- tbl(con09, "ReleasableInjuries") |>
  collect()
injs14 <- tbl(con14, "ReleasableInjuries") |>
  select(!Year) |>
  collect()
injs23 <- tbl(con23, "ReleasableInjuries") |>
  collect()

death09 <- tbl(con09, "ReleasableDeaths") |>
  collect()
death14 <- tbl(con14, "ReleasableDeaths") |>
  select(!Year) |>
  collect()
death23 <- tbl(con23, "ReleasableDeaths") |>
  collect()

vess09 <- tbl(con09, "ReleasableVessels") |>
  collect()
vess14 <- tbl(con14, "ReleasableVessels") |>
  select(!Year) |>
  collect()
vess23 <- tbl(con23, "ReleasableVessels") |>
  collect()

# join data into a single tibble for each database
data09 <- left_join(
    accs09, 
    injs09, 
    by = "BARDID", 
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) |> 
    left_join(
    vess09, 
    by = "BARDID", 
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) |>
    left_join(
    death09, 
    by = "BARDID", 
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) |>
  select(!c(matches("\\.y"), VesselID.x)) |>
  mutate(VesselID = as.character(VesselID))
  
data14 <- left_join(
    accs14, 
    injs14, 
    by = "BARDID", 
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) |> 
    left_join(
    vess14, 
    by = "BARDID", 
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) |> 
    left_join(
    death14, 
    by = "BARDID", 
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) |>
  select(!c(matches("\\.y"), VesselID.x)) |>
  mutate(VesselID = as.character(VesselID))

data23 <- left_join(
    accs23, 
    injs23, 
    by = "BARDID", 
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) |>
    left_join(
    vess23, 
    by = "BARDID", 
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) |>
    left_join(
    death23, 
    by = "BARDID", 
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) |>
  select(!c(matches("\\.y"), VesselID.x)) |>
  mutate(
    VesselID = as.character(VesselID),
    Year = 2023
  )
  
# join all database tables into a single master tibble
bard <- bind_rows(data09, data14, data23) |>
  janitor::clean_names() |>
  select(!c(number_deaths_x, number_injured_x, damageto_non_vessel_property)) |>
  rename_with(~ gsub("_x$", "", .), matches("_x$"))
```
